motion_system: Slow internal pulsing through perforation rows, with dotted conduits implying sampled voices moving between chambers.
color_drift: Near-black and deep blue-green ground drifting into electric cyan, with acid-lime rims and tiny pale cream edge sparks.
glow_behavior: Internal emission leaks from chamber seams, rim cuts, sockets, and black tunnel mouths; glow blooms like compressed video at the source apertures.
